---

设置技能扩展提示信息

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass
native StringLength takes string s returns integer
```


---

获取字符串长度

计算字符串的字符数量

示例: StringLength("Hello") = 5, StringLength("") = 0

**Parameters:**
- **`s`**: 要计算长度的字符串

**Returns:** 字符串的字符数量

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass
native SubString takes string source, integer start, integer end returns string
```


---

截取字符串

从源字符串中截取指定范围的子字符串

示例: SubString("Hello World", 0, 5) = "Hello"

SubString("Hello World", 6, 11) = "World"

**Parameters:**
- **`source`**: 源字符串
- **`start`**: 起始位置（下标从0开始）
- **`end`**: 结束位置（不包含该位置）

**Returns:** 截取后的子字符串

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass
native UnitAddAbility takes unit whichUnit, integer abilityId returns boolean
```


---

添加指定技能到指定单位 [R]

添加的技能默认为非永久性，会在单位变身恢复时消失，若要不消失，需设置技能永久性 UnitMakeAbilityPermanent

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass
native BlzGetAbilityIntegerField takes ability whichAbility, abilityintegerfield whichField returns integer
```


---

获取技能的整数域

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass
native BlzGetUnitAbility takes unit whichUnit, integer abilId returns ability
```


---

获取单位技能(指定技能ID)

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass

```

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`



---

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass
native GetHeroSkillPoints takes unit whichHero returns integer
```


---

获取指定英雄未使用的技能点数

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`

```jass
native UnitModifySkillPoints takes unit whichHero, integer skillPointDelta returns boolean
```


---

设置指定英雄未使用的技能点数 [R]

给与技能点数超过技能可学习等级时，额外的点数无效，拥有额外技能点数时仍遵循技能学习等级及跳级学习限制

**文件:** `c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\jass.jass-1.9.7\static\common.j`
